untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom z-score calculation on spread residuals from pairs trading (hedge ratio-based OLS residuals). This requires: (1) dual-asset spread construction, (2) dynamic mean/stdev calculation from residual series over lookback window, (3) z-score computation from residuals. None of these derived metrics (z_score, spread_residuals, hedge_ratio) are in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The signal is fundamentally a pairs trading rule that cannot be expressed using single-asset price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated pairs trading signal requiring external hedge ratio calculation and residual series tracking. It would need custom indicator support for: residual_zscore, spread_mean_60, spread_stdev_60. Entry would trigger when |residual_zscore| >= 2.0 (bullish if zscore > 2.0 for long, bearish if zscore < -2.0 for short). Exit when zscore reverts within ±1.0 or hits ±3.0 stop. Regime target is RANGING as spread mean-reversion works best in non-trending conditions.
